question: How did Canadian oil-sands GHG emissions intensity per barrel change between 2010 and 2023 according to ECCC?

evidence_pool.span_text: ECCC's National Inventory Report shows oil-sands GHG emissions intensity declined from approximately 0.080 tCO2e per barrel in 2010 to 0.066 tCO2e per barrel in 2023, a 17.5% reduction in emissions per unit of production.
Absolute oil-sands emissions rose 64% over the same period despite intensity declines, because production volumes nearly doubled.

verified_sentences.sentence_text: ECCC reports oil-sands emissions intensity declined from 0.080 to 0.066 tCO2e per barrel from 2010 to 2023, a 17.5% intensity reduction [#ev:ev_clim_001:800-1080]; absolute emissions still rose 64% as production nearly doubled [#ev:ev_clim_002:200-380].
